title.en: Standards for endoscopy units offering EMR training

statement.en: ESGE recommends the minimum desirable standards detailed in the following list be met by endoscopy units offering training in EMR.

text.en: Written and/or electronic pre-procedure pathways for the assessment of patients with co-morbidity prior to EMR.
Written local pre-procedure pathways for the correct dosing of anticoagulants prior to EMR based on international consensus guidelines.
Formal procedures for consent — written information, remote, or face-to-face — with adequate opportunity for patient questions and reflection.
